message:
feat: implement full search pipeline across embed, index, lexical, fusion, and rerank crates

Expand all five pipeline crates from stubs to full implementations:

frankensearch-embed — embedding pipeline:
- Hash embedder (fast, non-ML baseline), FastEmbed embedder (ONNX
  Runtime), Model2Vec embedder (lightweight transformer)
- Auto-detect: selects optimal embedder based on available resources
- Batch coalescer: merges concurrent embedding requests into optimal
  batches to maximize GPU/CPU throughput
- Model manifest, registry, and download system with SHA-256 integrity
  verification and configurable model paths

frankensearch-index — vector index (FSVI format, +2242 lines):
- Custom binary format with magic bytes, versioning, CRC32 checksums
- VectorIndex reader and VectorIndexWriter for memory-mapped I/O
- TwoTierIndex: dual-dimension indexing (fast dim + quality dim) for
  Matryoshka Representation Learning (MRL) two-pass search
- Brute-force cosine-similarity search with score thresholds
- Module stubs for HNSW, SIMD, quantization, WAL, and warmup

frankensearch-lexical — BM25 full-text search (+1420 lines):
- Full Tantivy BM25 implementation with TantivyIndex
- Schema creation, tokenization, concurrent batch indexing
- LexicalSearch trait implementation with scored results
- Comprehensive test suite with edge cases

frankensearch-fusion — result fusion and ranking (+16 modules):
- RRF (Reciprocal Rank Fusion) and score blending
- Adaptive fusion with feedback-driven weight adjustment
- Searcher orchestrating embed → index → lexical → fuse pipeline
- Circuit breaker, conformal prediction, calibration
- MMR (Maximal Marginal Relevance) for diversity
- OPE (Optimistic Policy Evaluation), PRF (Pseudo-Relevance Feedback)
- Score normalization, caching, phase gating, priority queue

frankensearch-rerank — cross-encoder reranking (+683 lines):
- FlashRank cross-encoder with ONNX Runtime inference
- Tokenization, sigmoid scoring, configurable batch sizes
- Reranker trait implementation and rerank_step() convenience function
- Pipeline module for multi-stage reranking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
